text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Greetings, fair trainer! My day off was filled with
utter bliss.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I spent the morning pouring over fan letters that
sang me the highest praises.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In the afternoon, I had a photo session for a
special issue of collectible prints that shall serve
as fine gifts for those fans.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At night, I set off to dreamland under the
watchful eye of my framed portrait.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I feel refreshed in both mind and body!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I shall commit myself fully to today's
training! Haaah ha ha ha ha ha!
